title: Shri Baglamukhi Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Baglamukhi Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Baglamukhi.
description:
Jai Jai Shri Baglamukhi Mata,
Aarti karhun tumhari॥
Peet vasan tan par tav sohai,
Kundal ki chhabi nyari॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Baglamukhi Mata ॥

Kar-kamalon mein mudgar dharai,
Astuti karhin sakal nar-nari॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Baglamukhi Mata ॥

Champak maal gale lehraave,
Sur nar muni jai jayati uchari॥
Trividh taap miti jaat sakal sab,
Bhakti sada tav hai sukhkari॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Baglamukhi Mata ॥

Paalat harat srijat tum jag ko,
Sab jeevan ki ho rakhwari॥
Moh nisha mein bhramat sakal jan,
Karhun hriday mahan, tum ujiyari॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Baglamukhi Mata ॥

Timir nashavhu gyaan badhavhu,
Ambe tumhi ho asurari॥
Santan ko sukh det sada hi,
Sab jan ki tum pran piyari॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Baglamukhi Mata ॥

Tav charnan jo dhyan lagave,
Taako ho sab bhav-bhayhari॥
Prem sahit jo karhin aarti,
Te nar mokshdham adhikari॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Baglamukhi Mata ॥

Baglamukhi ki aarti,
Padhai sunai jo koy॥
Vinti Kulpati Mishra ki,
Sukh-sampati sab hoy॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Baglamukhi Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Maa Baglamukhi's Aarti?
faq.a1: Maa Baglamukhi is the goddess of 'Stambhana' (the power to silence or paralyze). Her Aarti helps in achieving victory over enemies, success in legal disputes or debates, removal of negative energy, and attaining Vaaq-Siddhi (power of speech).
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: Tuesday is considered the best day for worshipping Maa Baglamukhi, especially when it coincides with specific astrological alignments.
faq.q3: What offering (Prasad) is preferred for Mother Baglamukhi during Aarti?
faq.a3: She is extremely fond of yellow-colored items. Offering yellow flowers, yellow clothes, and Besan Laddus (yellow sweets) is considered highly auspicious.
faq.q4: Can her Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed with full devotion and purity in the home temple. Since the Goddess is also known as 'Pitambara', ensure the use of yellow color in the rituals.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti for peace of mind?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Hreem Baglamukhyai Namah' after the Aarti is highly effective for focusing the mind and overcoming fear of enemies.
